_comment: Shared, non-personal defaults (safe to publish). Your personal info -- name, Life #, work email, recipients -- lives in profile.json (git-ignored); run 'timesheet setup' to create it. Your blank Daily Attendance Record PDF goes in template.pdf (git-ignored). Nothing personal is committed.
_schedule_comment: default_send_time = the Friday clock time (local, 24h HH:MM) used by 'schedule'/Graph when you don't pass --at.

email.subject: Time & Attendance Sheet submission
email.body:
Dear Team,

Please find attached my Time & Attendance Sheet for the payroll period of {period}.

Kind regards,
{name}

_holidays_comment: Auto-applied every run. Add ISO dates or A..B ranges (copy from _holidays_example). Weekends in a range are skipped. Year-agnostic; or put yours in profile.json.
_pto_comment: Auto-applied PTO. Each entry: {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD"} OR {"from":"...","to":"..."}, plus "code" (PTOS/PTOU) and "paid" (true=7.5h, false=unpaid lowers total). Copy from _pto_example.
_auth_comment: Microsoft Graph delegated auth (only used by the 'graph' method). Public 'Microsoft Graph Command Line Tools' client; no app registration. tenant: 'organizations' or your tenant GUID/domain.
